Examples

Sample Snippet

AttachToMemory(ref byte, uint, int)

Attaches the stream to memory. If transferOwnership is true, memory must be allocated with HeapAlloc() using GetProcessHeap().

virtual void AttachToMemory(ref byte blobMemory, uint Size, int transferOwnership)

Parameters

blobMemory byte
Size uint
transferOwnership int
